notes: Editable JSON. Do not render post text as images.
linkType can route to marketplace, vehicleListing, business, insurance, storage, shop, map, profile, 404, or none.
Marketplace prop posts are intentionally generic so game-side code can map itemType/tags to actual prop spawn IDs.

posts.author: Uncle Skeeter
posts.title: Blinker Fluid Emergency
posts.body: Anybody got DOT-approved blinker fluid? Left side is blinking dry and the right side sounds crunchy.

comments.author: Big Hank
comments.body: That is not a fluid system, Bob.

comments.author: Big Hank
comments.body: Then why does the parts store keep laughing when I ask?

posts.author: Frankie Flatbed
posts.title: Traction Upgrade Tested
posts.body: Put 38 drywall screws through my tires for winter grip. Works great until speed bumps start unscrewing the road.

comments.author: Tow Yard Terry
comments.body: I did roofing nails last year. Softer ride.

comments.author: Darla Diesel
comments.body: That explains the sparks on Route 5.

posts.author: Linda Lugnut
posts.title: Lost Muffler
posts.body: Lost a muffler near the diner. If found, please return. It answers to 'BWAHHHHH'.

posts.author: Darla Diesel
posts.title: Not Stuck
posts.body: For the record, I was not stuck. I was simply parked vertically in a ditch for tactical reasons.

comments.author: Cone Guy Carl
comments.body: Your hazard lights were spelling HELP.

comments.author: Billy No-Insurance
comments.body: That was Morse code for confidence.

posts.author: Nora Nitro
posts.title: Free Range Shopping Cart
posts.body: There is a shopping cart merging onto the highway again. Somebody come get your livestock.

comments.author: Suspicious Steve
comments.body: That cart belongs to the mall.

comments.author: Marge from Firwood
comments.body: Mall says it left for college.

comments.author: Turbo Tim
comments.body: It has better lane discipline than most drivers.

posts.author: Cletus McBlinker
posts.title: Garage Wisdom
posts.body: Mechanic said I need a new transfer case. I asked if we could just transfer the case to somebody else.

posts.author: Pete Parts
posts.title: Noise Complaint
posts.body: Whoever is testing a horn at 2 AM, congratulations, it works. The whole valley heard it.

posts.author: Tow Yard Terry
posts.title: DIY Alignment
posts.body: Did my own alignment using string, a mailbox, and prayer. Truck now drives straight if the road agrees.

posts.author: Nora Nitro
posts.title: Fuel Economy Hack
posts.body: Removed my doors, hood, bumper, and common sense. Gained 0.4 MPG and 9 legal problems.

posts.author: Randy Roadkill
posts.title: Professional Advice
posts.body: If your check engine light comes on, put tape over it. If it comes back, use better tape.

comments.author: Cone Guy Carl
comments.body: The black electrical tape is OEM quality.

posts.author: Cone Guy Carl
posts.title: Suspicious Cargo
posts.body: If anyone asks, the 14 traffic barrels in my driveway are decorative planters.

comments.author: Bumper Brenda
comments.body: They still say county road crew.

posts.author: Billy No-Insurance
posts.title: Driveway Jump
posts.body: Built a small driveway ramp. Mailman says it is not small. Ambulance says it is not a driveway anymore.

posts.author: Pete Parts
posts.title: Brake Scent
posts.body: Is it normal for brakes to smell like campfire and panic?

comments.author: Wanda Winchline
comments.body: Stop towing a house with a hatchback.

posts.author: Marge from Firwood
posts.title: New Tire Plan
posts.body: Rotated my tires front to neighbor's yard. Anybody got a jack and a believable story?

comments.author: Billy No-Insurance
comments.body: Use the one from last time.

posts.author: Turbo Tim
posts.title: Insurance Question
posts.body: Hypothetically, if a deer hits your car while you are parked in a lake, is that comprehensive?

comments.author: Tow Yard Terry
comments.body: Depends if the deer was insured.

posts.author: Marge from Firwood
posts.title: Speed Bump Review
posts.body: New speed bumps downtown are too aggressive. One of them followed me home stuck to my frame.

posts.author: Bumper Brenda
posts.title: Quality Repair
posts.body: Replaced my bumper with a railroad tie. Now small crashes sound historical.

comments.author: Bumper Brenda
comments.body: It has splinters at highway speed.

posts.author: Cletus McBlinker
posts.title: Tow Strap Etiquette
posts.body: Reminder: a tow strap is not a friendship bracelet for trucks. Stop hooking to mirrors.

posts.author: Bumper Brenda
posts.title: Road Cone Mystery
posts.body: Why are there cones in my bed? Truck bed, not sleeping bed. This time.

posts.author: Turbo Tim
posts.title: Neighborhood Alert
posts.body: If your sedan is missing, check the roof of Big Hank's garage. He says the lift was 'calibrating.'

posts.author: Cletus McBlinker
posts.title: Mud Test
posts.body: Went mudding. Mud won. Truck is now part of the landscape.

comments.author: Marge from Firwood
comments.body: Do not sell it as waterfront property.

posts.author: Linda Lugnut
posts.title: Trailer Math
posts.body: A 2,000 lb trailer plus a 900 lb compact equals confidence until the hill starts asking questions.

posts.author: Nora Nitro
posts.title: Washer Fluid Substitute
posts.body: Can I use sweet tea as washer fluid? Asking before I become famous.

posts.author: Cone Guy Carl
posts.title: Strange Rattle
posts.body: Truck has a rattle that stops when I turn the radio up. Fixed?

posts.author: Linda Lugnut
posts.title: Curb Appeal
posts.body: Hit one curb and suddenly everybody says I 'should not drive the parade float.' Fake friends.

comments.author: Darla Diesel
comments.body: The mayor was on the float.

posts.author: Sheriff Knox
posts.title: Cheap Lift Kit
posts.body: Installed a homemade lift kit using hockey pucks and stubbornness. Rides like a shopping cart in a dryer.

comments.author: Marge from Firwood
comments.body: Inspection station has entered the chat.

posts.author: Bumper Brenda
posts.title: Bridge Height
posts.body: Box truck almost fit under the bridge. I feel like the sign should say 'probably not.'

posts.author: Rusty Ray
posts.title: Garage Sale Warning
posts.body: Selling used airbags. Some already deployed, some emotionally ready.

posts.author: Turbo Tim
posts.title: Legal Question
posts.body: Can a car be considered a boat if it is only floating briefly?

posts.author: Cone Guy Carl
posts.title: Tire Pressure
posts.body: Inflated tires to 90 PSI because more number means more better. Truck now corners like a scared balloon.

posts.author: Marge from Firwood
posts.title: Horn Upgrade
posts.body: Installed train horn. Now the train waves back.

posts.author: Darla Diesel
posts.title: Country GPS
posts.body: GPS said turn left into a field. I trusted technology. Cow did not.

posts.author: Officer Dale
posts.title: Rust Prevention
posts.body: Covered my frame in bacon grease to prevent rust. Now dogs follow me to work.

posts.author: Officer Dale
posts.title: Career Advice
posts.body: Thinking about opening a mobile repair shop. Services include jump starts, bad advice, and removing evidence.

comments.author: Jenny Jbeam
comments.body: Do not advertise the third one.

posts.author: Suspicious Steve
posts.title: Light Bar Etiquette
posts.body: If your light bar can tan a deer at 200 yards, maybe aim it lower.

posts.author: Tow Yard Terry
posts.title: Professional Driver
posts.body: I have driven this road 400 times. Today I learned there is a ditch.

comments.author: Tow Yard Terry
comments.body: Tow Yard Terry reacted with money.

posts.author: Marty Mudflap
posts.title: Mystery Button
posts.body: Pressed a button I found under the dash. Now the radio speaks Italian and the wipers salute.

comments.author: Cone Guy Carl
comments.body: Press it twice for pasta mode.

posts.author: Linda Lugnut
posts.title: Auction Regret
posts.body: Bought a car listed as 'ran when parked.' Turns out it was parked in 1998 and ran from the police.

posts.author: Marty Mudflap
posts.title: Snow Chain Hack
posts.body: Used extension cords as snow chains. Power company is asking questions.

posts.author: Big Hank
posts.title: Farm Truck Pride
posts.body: My truck has three colors: primer, rust, and court evidence.

posts.author: Darla Diesel
posts.title: Tow Warning
posts.body: Do not tow from a plastic bumper. This message sponsored by half a bumper.

posts.author: Earl E-Brake
posts.title: Garage Smell
posts.body: If a garage smells like gas, oil, and regret, is that bad ventilation or character?

posts.author: Wanda Winchline
posts.title: Truck Bed Pool
posts.body: Filled my truck bed with water for the kids. Forgot tailgate gap. Street got a wave pool.

posts.author: Jenny Jbeam
posts.title: Police Scanner
posts.body: Whoever reported a UFO over the quarry, that was my hood after the jump.

posts.author: Cletus McBlinker
posts.title: Tow Yard Etiquette
posts.body: If your vehicle arrives at my yard upside down, storage fees still apply. Gravity is not a coupon.

posts.author: Sheriff Knox
posts.title: Mechanic Review
posts.body: Five stars to the mechanic who said 'wow' before giving me the estimate. Honest communication.

posts.author: Linda Lugnut
posts.title: Siren Confusion
posts.body: To the guy who followed the ambulance thinking it was a pace car: stop.

posts.author: Uncle Skeeter
posts.title: Roadside Picnic
posts.body: Broke down again. If anyone wants sandwiches, I am by mile marker 12 with a sedan and lowered expectations.

posts.author: Linda Lugnut
posts.title: Mudflap Debate
posts.body: Are mudflaps required if the whole vehicle is mud?

posts.author: Marge from Firwood
posts.title: Shopping List
posts.body: Need: one radiator, two headlights, three excuses, and a passenger who will stop screaming.

posts.author: Randy Roadkill
posts.title: Exhaust Recipe
posts.body: Trying to make my exhaust sound deeper. So far it just sounds divorced.

posts.author: The Real Belasco Mechanic
posts.title: Fender Bender
posts.body: Minor fender bender. Fender left. Bender stayed.

posts.author: Fire & Rescue 7
posts.title: Police Advisory: Quarry Road
posts.body: Multiple vehicles attempted to jump the construction trench. The trench remains undefeated. Expect delays and tow trucks.

posts.author: Fire & Rescue 7
posts.title: Belasco PD: Cone Theft
posts.body: We are aware of the missing road cones downtown. Returning them anonymously is better than using them as lawn flamingos.

posts.author: Sheriff Knox
posts.title: Accident Report: Firwood Hill
posts.body: Two trucks, one trailer, and a piano were involved. No serious injuries. The piano is considered emotionally totaled.

posts.author: County Roads Office
posts.title: Road Closure: West Coast Bridge
posts.body: Bridge inspection underway after a box truck tried to become a convertible.

posts.author: County Roads Office
posts.title: Public Notice: Raceway Noise
posts.body: Reports of engine noise near the raceway have been confirmed to be the raceway.

posts.author: County Roads Office
posts.title: Sheriff Notice: Illegal Ramp
posts.body: The plywood ramp behind the grocery store is not county-approved infrastructure.

posts.author: Belasco Police Department
posts.title: Tow Notice: Lake Road
posts.body: Submerged vehicles will be charged wet storage fees. Tow Yard Terry says towels are not included.

posts.author: Port Authority
posts.title: Safety Reminder: Load Securement
posts.body: If your couch passes you on the highway, your tie-down strategy has failed.

posts.author: Port Authority
posts.title: Insurance Bulletin
posts.body: Driving into a decorative fountain is not 'hydro testing.'

posts.author: Fire & Rescue 7
posts.title: County Roads: Fresh Gravel
posts.body: Fresh gravel has been placed. This is not an invitation to test drift angles.

posts.author: County Roads Office
posts.title: Belasco PD: Suspicious Trailer
posts.body: A trailer full of mannequins is legal. Creepy, but legal. Stop calling 911 unless they start driving.

posts.author: Port Authority
posts.title: Fire Dept Notice
posts.body: Do not extinguish brake fires with energy drinks. That is not science.

posts.author: Beam Insurance Claims
posts.title: DMV Notice
posts.body: A cracked windshield cannot be repaired with clear packing tape and optimism.

posts.author: Sheriff Knox
posts.title: Public Works
posts.body: Please stop moving detour signs to create shortcuts to your house.

posts.author: Fire & Rescue 7
posts.title: Police Advisory: Night Driving
posts.body: If you cannot see over your dashboard, remove the stack of unpaid parking tickets from it.

posts.author: Sheriff Knox
posts.title: Road Hazard
posts.body: Loose tire on Route 8. Tire appears confident and refuses to pull over.

posts.author: Port Authority
posts.title: Tow Rotation Notice
posts.body: Recovered vehicles from the canyon will be processed by rotation. Vehicles found in trees require extra paperwork.

posts.author: Sheriff Knox
posts.title: Belasco PD: Noise Enforcement
posts.body: A muffler delete is not a musical instrument permit.

posts.author: Sheriff Knox
posts.title: County Notice: Mudslide
posts.body: Mudslide near old mine road. This is a hazard, not a free off-road park.

posts.author: Port Authority
posts.title: Insurance PSA
posts.body: A vehicle listed as 'lightly rolled' may still count as rolled.

posts.author: County Roads Office
posts.title: Garage Fire Update
posts.body: Small garage fire contained. Cause listed as 'experimental fuel economy device.'

posts.author: Fire & Rescue 7
posts.title: Highway Patrol
posts.body: Do not race the AI traffic. The AI has no fear, no insurance, and no family to disappoint.

posts.author: Beam Insurance Claims
posts.title: City Alert: Roundabout
posts.body: The roundabout is not a carousel. Stop doing laps for applause.

posts.author: Beam Insurance Claims
posts.title: Parking Notice
posts.body: Vehicles parked on top of other vehicles will be cited separately.

posts.author: County Roads Office
posts.title: Belasco PD: Found Property
posts.body: Recovered: one hood, blue; one bumper, red; one driver, confused.

posts.author: Fire & Rescue 7
posts.title: Rail Crossing Reminder
posts.body: The train has priority. The train also has mass. Please do not argue with either.

posts.author: Fire & Rescue 7
posts.title: Construction Notice
posts.body: Road crew barrels are not collectibles. Marketplace listings will be monitored.

posts.author: Port Authority
posts.title: Public Safety
posts.body: If your trailer starts steering, stop and rethink your afternoon.

posts.author: Fire & Rescue 7
posts.title: Port Authority
posts.body: Dock ramps are slippery. That does not make them launch ramps.

posts.author: County Roads Office
posts.title: Sheriff Knox Update
posts.body: We are still looking for the owner of a wheel found inside the courthouse fountain.

posts.title: 12 traffic cones for sale
posts.body: Safety orange. Mostly round. One has bite marks. Pickup only unless you pay extra and avoid asking paperwork questions.
